description_long: This object consists of five round, glossy red cherry fruits arranged in a straight horizontal line, each with a slender green stem, some of which are slightly curved and tipped with a brownish node. The cherries are smooth and plump, with a rich, deep red coloration that suggests ripeness. The stems are attached at the top of each fruit, and their green color contrasts sharply with the red of the cherries. The cherries are closely spaced, forming a small cluster, but each fruit remains distinct and separate. No leaves or blossoms are visible, and the object appears to be a stylized representation of fresh cherries. The overall appearance is vibrant and lifelike, suitable for decorative or illustrative use in urban environments such as markets, parks, or signage.
description: A row of five glossy red cherries with green stems, closely grouped and highly realistic. The cherries are smooth, plump, and vibrant, with no leaves or blossoms present.
description_view_0: The cherries are seen end-on, forming a vertical stack with stems visible at the top.
description_view_1: A clear side view showing all five cherries in a horizontal row, with four visible green stems and one cherry without a stem.
description_view_2: The cherries are seen from the opposite end, again stacked vertically with stems visible at the top.
description_view_3: A side view similar to view 1, but mirrored, showing all five cherries in a row with stems oriented in the opposite direction.
